assertions.description: Every .py component file runs without error and prints PASS
All verify_step.py runs at each decomposition gate report PASS
Final composition_test.py passes end-to-end numerical equivalence
Output has expected directory structure (level_X_*/, steps/, verification/)
decomposition_tree.json is present and valid JSON
Every leaf node in the decomposition tree is at kernel level (L0)
Component files use exact same dimensions as original model
